title: Dryopteris moulmaynensis
taxonomy: Dryopteris moulmaynensis is classified as a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This genus Dryopteris is commonly known as the wood ferns. The species Dryopteris moulmaynensis is native to the Himalayas. It belongs to the class Polypodiopsida and the phylum Pteridophyta. The classification of Dryopteris moulmaynensis reflects its unique characteristics as a vascular plant.
